text: Co-organizing the "Structure-from-Motion in the Age of Deep Learning" workshop at ECCV 2026.
Invited speaker at the Mathematics of 3D Reconstruction 2026 workshop, organized by ICERM.
"Global-Aware Edge Prioritization for Pose Graph Initialization" received an oral and is a CVPR 2026 Best Paper Award candidate (top 0.4% of submissions).
Co-organizing the "1st Generative 3D Reconstruction" workshop at CVPR 2026.
Started as a part-time Visiting Researcher at Google Zurich.
Co-organizing the "RANSAC in 2025" tutorial at ICCV 2025.
Ranked among the top-25 researchers by number of accepted papers at ECCV 2024 (9 papers).
Awarded a Career Seed Award (30k CHF) as PI for 2024–2025.
GLOMAP - Global Structure-from-Motion Revisited - accepted to ECCV 2024.
Promoted to Established Researcher in the Computer Vision and Geometry Group at ETH Zürich.
